generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller. Executed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer."
]

instance SteeringAngleActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls the steering angle of the vehicle through a servo mechanism integrated into the lower-level chassis. Interfaced via ROS2 nodes."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in the vehicle's proximity."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures depth and RGB data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthAndRGBData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors the ego vehicle's speed via onboard sensors integrated into the lower-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors the ego vehicle's steering angle via onboard sensors integrated into the lower-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthAndRGBData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud segmentation to identify objects in the vehicle's proximity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements Kalman filtering for state estimation of detected objects (position, velocity, size) from LiDAR and camera data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Follows ISO 15622 standard for performance class I ACC (speed control based on lead vehicle distance)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllingEnabler
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time streams of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and detected object tracks (position, velocity, size) from LiDAR and camera."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringAngleData, ProcessedObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler, DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance HistoricalVehicleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Stored time-series data of ego vehicle state and object tracks in external SQL database for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

instance SimulatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated via MATLAB/Simulink for complex system validation and ACC algorithm development."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular software integration and inter-node communication framework for onboard data exchange between sensors, actuators, and functional entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler, ActuationEnabler, DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development SDK for Jetson hardware programming, enabling onboard computation and sensor integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler, ActuationEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation tool for point cloud processing and ACC algorithm development, generating simulated data for validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControllingEnabler
]

instance WiFiCommunicationProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wireless communication protocol for inter-entity communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External database for storing historical vehicle and object track data for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingEnabler, DataStorageEnabler
]

instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hosted on Physical Twin Entity (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano), performs DBSCAN clustering on LiDAR point clouds and Kalman filtering for object tracking before transmission."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ensures interoperability between ROS2 (onboard) and Wi-Fi (external) communication, aligning message types and performing unit conversions."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionEnabler
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hosted in Digital Twin Entity, collects real-time data streams from Physical Twin via Wi-Fi after translation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControllingEnabler, ReportingEnabler
]

instance ACCControllingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Hosted in Digital Twin Entity, computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance using ISO 15622 ACC model."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService, DataStorageEnabler
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data from historical database."
    DTDFVocab:enables PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes motor and steering control commands on Physical Twin Entity via ROS2 nodes."
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores ego vehicle state and object track data in external SQL database for long-term analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsInsight, OperationalInsightsInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation from resource-constrained Physical Twin to Digital Twin, computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdatesAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to remotely enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, and issue emergency braking commands via Control Panel User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdatesAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data for analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores ego vehicle state and object track data in external SQL database for historical analysis and reporting."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PerformanceAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides real-time and historical data on ego vehicle state and object tracks for ACC optimization."
]

instance OperationalInsightsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving paths and object tracks aids in route planning and safety-critical decision-making."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to stored time-series data of vehicle state and object tracks for long-term performance analysis."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies anomalies in sensor data or actuator behavior (e.g., sudden speed deviations) for predictive maintenance."
]

instance ParameterUpdatesAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters (e.g., desired speed, braking thresholds) based on real-time monitoring data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking commands when safety-critical conditions are detected."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers alerts for maintenance when anomalies in sensor data or actuator behavior are detected."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environments/Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano onboard the 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle. Contains Data Pre-Processing FE (point cloud clustering/tracking) and Actuation FE (motor/steering control)."
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosted externally (cloud/edge), contains Data Collection FE, ACC Controlling FE, Reporting FE, and Presentation FE (visualization pre-processing)."
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosted on operator workstation, contains 3D Visualization FE and Control Panel FE for remote management."
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Contains Data Translation FE to ensure interoperability between ROS2 (onboard) and Wi-Fi (external) communication."
]

instance TwoLayerChassis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical vehicle architecture with lower-level chassis for steering/speed control and upper-level chassis hosting autonomy components."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted with ACC digital twin implementation."
    base:contains TwoLayerChassis, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, CrossSystemEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin (DT) to the physical twin (PT) include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DT, which are transmitted back to the PT for motor actuation.
  - **Remote management commands** (e.g., enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) sent via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** on the PT.
  - **Actuation commands** are executed on the PT via ROS2 nodes interfacing with the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and **steering servo**, ensuring real-time response with a maximum latency of **100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time-scale** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency** between PT and DT is limited to **≤100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization** between PT and DT components is maintained with an accuracy of **±100 ms** (due to hardware limitations).
  - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated continuously, with LiDAR data processed at high frequency (dependent on sensor refresh rates, typically **10–30 Hz** for LiDAR)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **entity-based architecture** adapted from **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **Data Pre-Processing FE** (LiDAR clustering/tracking) and **Actuation FE** (motor/steering control), deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosts **Data Collection FE**, **ACC Controlling FE**, **Reporting FE**, and **Presentation FE**, deployed externally (cloud/edge).
  - **User Entity**: Hosts **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE**, deployed on an operator workstation.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures seamless data exchange between ROS2 (onboard) and Wi-Fi (external) networks.
  The constellation enables **computation offloading**, **real-time monitoring**, and **remote management** while adhering to **ISO 23247’s layered reference architecture** with deviations (e.g., addition of the Physical Twin Entity)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages of the PT:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and simulators (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing).
  - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., health monitoring of actuators/sensors).
  - **Validation Phase**: Supports **compliance validation** with ACC requirements (ISO 15622) and **safety-critical testing** via real-time data collection and simulation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Achieved via **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** and **low-latency communication (≤100 ms)**.
  - **Model validation**: ACC control logic adheres to **ISO 15622** for performance class I systems.
  - **Data integrity**: Ensured via **Data Translation FE**, which aligns message types and performs unit conversions.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Addressed through **Kalman filtering** for object tracking and **DBSCAN clustering** for LiDAR data segmentation.
  - **Verification**: Conducted via **real-world testing** of the 1/10th-scale PT and **simulation-based validation** using MATLAB/Simulink."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (PT ↔ DT) with **≤100 ms latency** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Onboard Communication**: **ROS2 topics** for intra-entity communication (e.g., sensor data to Data Pre-Processing FE).
  - **Data Translation**: **Data Translation FE** serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions between ROS2 and Wi-Fi-based communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across multiple hardware components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the PT) for real-time sensor processing and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally (cloud/edge) for computation-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC control, reporting).
  - **User Entity**: Deployed on an **operator workstation** for visualization and remote management.
  The deployment follows a **hybrid architecture**, with **ROS2** for onboard modules and **Wi-Fi** for external communication."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited to the scope of the DT system, with no explicit mention of external system integration. However, the architecture supports potential integration with:
  - **Other ADAS systems** (e.g., lane-keeping assist, collision avoidance) via **ROS2 middleware**.
  - **Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication** standards (e.g., **3GPP TS 22.185**) for future scalability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, adapted for automotive use (with deviations like the **Physical Twin Entity**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system requirements for performance class I.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Service requirements for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication, including **≤100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)**.
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for modular software integration.
  - **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0**: SDK standard for Jetson hardware development."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Real-time constraints**: Ensures **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock synchronization** to prevent unsafe operational states.
  - **Remote operation safety**: Emergency braking commands are directly transmitted to the PT via the **Actuation FE**, with no intermediate processing delays.
  - **Data integrity**: Validated through **Data Translation FE** and **ROS2 middleware**, ensuring no corruption or loss of critical data.
  - **Safety-critical validation**: ACC logic complies with **ISO 15622**, and the system is tested in real-world scenarios (1/10th-scale PT).
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators can override automated commands via the **Control Panel FE**, ensuring safety in mixed autonomy scenarios."
]
